title: 1 step DFU - new DFU screen Release notes link
scenario: Release notes links on DFU screen do not open the correct web pages for Osprey EB and CC devices
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Ensure an Osprey EB device is connected with firmware version 5039 or higher and an update is available.
3. Tap the Update button on the Home screen to open the DFU (Device Firmware Update) screen.
4. On the DFU screen, locate and tap the Release Notes link.
5. Verify that the correct web page opens in the device browser.
6. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate to Settings → [Osprey EB Device Name] → Device Settings → Firmware Update (or similar path to DFU screen).
8. On the DFU screen, locate and tap the Release Notes link again.
9. Verify that the correct web page opens in the device browser.
10. Repeat steps 1–9 with an Osprey CC device (firmware version 5039 or higher) that has an update available.
expected: Tapping the Release Notes link on the DFU screen, both from the Home screen update flow and from the Settings screen, opens the correct corresponding web page for the connected device.
